case_title: ANDREW BEAURLINE VS. SALMA M. KHAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-01-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KHAN, SALMA M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEAURLINE, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHAN, SALMA M. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,610.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF SALMA KHAN RE CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT KHAN, SALMA M.

REVIEW OF INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN FILED BY SALMA M. KHAN SET FOR NOV-01-2012 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-31-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO INCREASE MONTHLY PAYMENTS FROM $175 TO $185 PER MONTH. ALL OTHER TERMS REMAIN THE SAME. REVIEW OF INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN IS SCHEDULED FOR OCT 31, 2013 AT 11:00AM", PER JUDGE MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
